title: Intense Sweet Brazilian Banana Pudding
description: A light and sweet Brazilian dessert featuring Nutella and sashimi-cut bananas, perfect for a sick day pick-me-up.
instructions: In a large bowl, whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
In a separate bowl, mix together the sweetened condensed milk, Nutella, and vanilla extract.
Add the sliced bananas to the Nutella mixture and stir until they are well coated.
In a small saucepan, melt the unsalted butter over low heat.
Add the salt to the melted butter and stir to combine.
Pour the butter mixture into the Nutella mixture and stir until well combined.
Fold the whipped cream into the Nutella mixture until no white streaks remain.
Spoon the pudding into individual serving cups.
Chill the pudding in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Garnish with chocolate shavings, if desired.
